title: Polish & Interaction — Animation, Deletion, Undo, OR Levels
summary: Make Signal Circuit feel like a real game: add signal flow animation that shows signals traveling through wires, wire and gate deletion UI, undo/redo system, 3 new levels introducing the OR gate and basic gate combinations, gate rotation support, and significant visual polish including better shadows, cleaner IC chip rendering, and LED-style output indicators.

tasks.description: Signal flow animation — when RUN is pressed, animate signals propagating through wires one at a time with visible movement (glowing dot traveling along wire path). Show each truth table row being evaluated sequentially with a brief pause.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking RUN shows animated signal flow, not instant results
A glowing dot or pulse travels along each wire during animation
Each truth table row animates in sequence with ~500ms gap
Truth table rows light up one at a time as they're evaluated
Final result shown after all rows animate

tasks.description: Wire deletion — click on a wire to select it (highlight), then Delete/Backspace to remove. Also right-click wire to delete immediately.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking near a wire selects it (visual highlight)
Delete/Backspace removes selected wire
Right-clicking a wire removes it immediately
Wire removal updates simulation correctly

tasks.description: Undo/redo system — track gate placement, gate removal, wire creation, wire removal as undoable actions. Ctrl+Z to undo, Ctrl+Shift+Z to redo.
acceptance_criteria: Ctrl+Z undoes the last action (gate place, gate remove, wire create, wire remove)
Ctrl+Shift+Z redoes the last undone action
Undo stack clears redo stack when new action is performed
Works for at least 20 actions deep

tasks.description: Add 3 new levels: Level 3 — OR Gate Basics (introduce OR), Level 4 — AND + NOT (build NAND behavior), Level 5 — OR + NOT (build NOR behavior). All with proper truth tables.
acceptance_criteria: Level 3 uses OR gate, completable with single OR gate
Level 4 requires AND + NOT combination, truth table is NAND
Level 5 requires OR + NOT combination, truth table is NOR
All levels have clear descriptions and correct truth tables
Level navigation works across all 5 levels

tasks.description: Visual polish — LED-style output indicators that glow, better gate shadows with proper depth, cleaner wire routing with slight curves, highlight pins on hover.
acceptance_criteria: Output nodes have LED-like glow effect when value is 1
Gate shadows give proper 3D depth appearance
Pin circles glow on mouse hover for better discoverability
Overall visual quality noticeably improved from Day 1

testing_focus: Wire deletion doesn't break circuit state
All 5 levels completable with correct circuits
Visual polish doesn't introduce rendering bugs
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
